summary: 2018 DHS 'See Something, Say Something / Protect Your Every Day' public-service announcement: everyday people (a firefighter, a teacher in a classroom) deliver spoken testimonial lines to camera urging viewers to report suspicious activity, ending on a See Say end card with the DHS seal. Spoken-word/testimonial driven, not a song, and a conventional informational PSA from the first Trump term. Out of scope: a plain informational PSA, not youth-appeal music-driven genre content.
notable_text: Protect your every day. Report suspicious activity to local authorities.; If you SEE something SAY something
